tools.name: status_overview
tools.description: OpenClaw-inspired /status style overview of graph and memory readiness in one read pass.

playbook.summary: Mirror OpenClaw command-palette ergonomics: inspect first, then decide follow-up actions.
steps: Use node and edge counts to explain graph health
Recommend the next tool call only when a concrete gap is found

tools.name: tools_inventory_compact
tools.description: OpenClaw-inspired compact tool inventory for node-level inspection.

playbook.summary: Equivalent to a lightweight /tools view for graph assets.
steps: Group nodes by type and surface outliers
Offer one deterministic cleanup or enrichment suggestion

tools.name: memory_lookup_fast
tools.description: Fast memory probe aligned with OpenClaw slash-command style interactions.

playbook.summary: Use quick search loops before mutating memory records.
steps: Run memory_lookup_fast with the user topic
Only escalate to write tools if user explicitly requests updates
